titleStmt.title: SII 18.151: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 151. (B.K. No. 61 of 1933-34.) NĪRALGI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab lying near the ruined fort.

summary.p: This inscription, of which some lines in the beginning are lost, is dated in the 10th year of the reign of Jagadēkamalla, Prabhava, Pushya śu. 13, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1148, January 5. The weekday however was Monday, not Thursday as stated in the record.

After giving an elaborate description of Nēṟilage and of Malla-gāvuṇḍa, the Nāḷprabhu of that place, the inscription states that he constructed a Jaina Chaityālaya called Mallijināśraya. A grant, probably of land, made to the Jinālaya is recorded. Hariṇandidēva, the āchārya of the Jinālaya and the female ascetic (āryikā) Chandramatiyavve are highly praised. The genealogy of Malla-gāvuṇḍa is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kṣatrapavitranātma Some lines in the beginning are lost.
yakēsiprauḍhabhūpāḷanaṁ . Ā nāḍa pūrvvadigbhāga
tiḷakamenikkuṁ . v® . Idu sukhadoṁdu janmag®hamiṁtidu bhōga
levīḍenippudu nēṟilakōttamanāmadhēyaka © svasti samastavastu
jīvarājita divākara jinasnapanasamayasamuccaḷitadivyagandha bandhuragandha
yōjamakaraṁdarēṇurāgapiṁjarīkṛtaśiḷīmukhaṁ . samaramukhaṣaṇmukha
ṣajyaśāstradānānūnanūtanaśrēyāmsa . bhāratīkarṇnāvataṁsa . samuttuṁgaraṁgadvi citracaitya
kara dēvādhidēvasupratiṣṭhitāgaṇyapuṇyōpārjjita . bhayalōbhavarjjita jagatprasiddhāparājita yakṣa prasāda
taṁ śrīmannāḷprabhu nēṟilageya mallagāvuṁḍana prabhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . v® . koḷadoḷ sasmitapaṁkajaṁ jaḷadhiyoḷ lakṣīśanudyaṁnabhasthaḷiyoḷ caṁḍamarīci pūrvva
śakrēbhamirppante baḷuvaḷisuttaṁ nijagōtraputrasahitaṁ vikrāṁtalakṣmīvadhūtiḷakaṁ śrī prabhumallanoḷupanoḷakoṇḍirddaṁ dharāmaṇḍanaṁ . karaṇīyaṁ satyaśaucaṁ tanage
krāṁtamuṁ dhairyyamuṁ meyisiri dharmmaṁ tannoḷārmmaṁ calamadu kulavidyānvitaṁ tannoḷeṁbī birudaṁ kaikoṇḍutadvaṁśajaroḷadhikanāriṁdameṁboḷuphuvettaṁ paramārttha mallagāṁvuṇḍana mahime
yanantiṁtenalu ballanāvoṁ . kaṁ . cittaṁ jinapatipadadoḷ vittaṁ caturuditadānadoḷ kīrtti diśābhittigaḷoḷ saṁdire lōkōttamanādaṁ babāppunāḷprabhu mallaṁ . mallaṁ paravadhuveḷasidoḍollaṁ
mithyāmatakke sallaṁ ripuh®cchellaṁ parahitaguṇadoḷ pallavipa jasakke tāne tāygaruvādaṁ . v® . svabhujōpārjjitamāgupārjjisidanintīv®ttiyaṁ nōḍa nāḷprabhuvī beḷuhuge saṁda nēṟi
lage vikhyātākaraṁ koḷanūrvvibhavāḷaṁkṛtavemmevaḷḷi vasudhāśōbhākaraṁ śrīkaraprabhavaṁ kaluhoḷegulugavaḷḷiyumanī mallaṁ yaśōvallabhaṁ . ka . toṟeyiguḷeyanaṁkolageya neṟeda ma
hatvaprabhutvamaṁ tāḷdi jasaṁ neṟediṁgaḷa taṇgadirene miṟugalu baḷiya kuḷadīpakaṁ pesarvvettaṁ . v® . kulada madaṁ vivēkada madaṁ prabhuśaktimadaṁ samagradōrvvaḷada madaṁgaḷaṁ manadegoḷḷade
bāppure tanna mutta mūdaleyaroḷinnārārumaṇamillene peṁpinaguṁpuvetta nēṟilageya mallanalladarihaṁparavilladaroḷpanolladar . Ā mahānubhāvananvayaprabhāvameṁteṁda
ḍe . ka . vinutajinadharmmavārmmaṁ jinamunigaḷ tanage paramagurugaḷenalu sajjananuta catu rtthakuḷamaṇḍananādaṁ vinayanidhimahāprabhudaḍigaṁ . v® . nuḍi kalloḷ kaḍedakkarakke maṟu
vakkaṁ vikramaṁ siṁhamaṁ jaḍiguṁ tannaya dānaśakti surabhūjānīkadoḷ pūṇdu kōḍiḍuguṁ kaṁtuge kiṁtuvaṁ janiyikuṁ sauṁdaryyameṁdaṁdu pēḷ daḍi gaṁgārppaḍi pāṭipāsaṭi samaṁ paṭṭāntaraṁ māna
var . ka . ballahanene negarddāhavamallaṁ koḍeyaḍapamaṁdaḷaṁ sīgiriyeṁbellā cihnamana daṭara mallaṁ daḍigaṁge koṭṭanandādaradiṁ . Ā prabhuvina kulavadhu śīlaprabheyiṁdattima bbegaṁ rēva
kagaṁ bhūpraṇute samanenippa yaśaḥprakaṭite rēvakabbegeṇeyārssatiyar . tatputraṁ . v® . puṭṭidanantavarggeṟakaneṁba mahāprabhu vamśavarddhanam jeṭṭiganarhadaṁgh®naḷinānata bh®ṁganu
dāri biṇpu mārkkaṭṭaḷeyāytu maṁdaranagakke baṇaṁjakuḷakke nāḷke tanniṭṭude boṭṭu kaṭṭidude kaṇṭhike biṭṭude tāṁpraśāsanaṁ . ka . Ā vibhuge dēvalabbe guṇāvaḷiyiṁ puruṣa bhaktiyiṁ śī
ḷadoḷaṁ tīvi jinamatake śāsanadēviyenalu peṁpuvetta kulavadhuvādaḷ . tatputra . v® . beṭṭada nuṇpinante kaḍudūradoḷoḷḷidareyde vōge kalugaṭṭenipanyarēno mahimōnnati
yiṁdiḷikeyvaneyde poṁbeṭṭamanā gabhīrateyinaṁbudhiyaṁ gelevaṁdaneṁbudā caṭṭanananya sainikagharaṭṭanananvayaratnapaṭṭanaṁ . ka . Ene negardda caṭṭagāvuṇḍana mānini cāyikave gāvuṁḍi
jagajjanake budhajanake jinajanakanupamanijajanake kalpalateyavolesedaḷ . v® . vinayada peṁpinunnatiya māntanadoḷupina saccaritradārppina nijagōtrarakṣaṇeya dharmmada permmeya voṁda
nondu neṭṭane mige saccaturtthakuḷadīpike tānenisirdda cāmiyakkanoḷeṇeyārmmahāpra bhuśikhāmaṇi caṭṭana paṇyakānteyoḷ . Ā daṁpatigaḷgādaradādarssatputraramaragajara danaṁ
nālkādaṁte mallaneṟakanudārayutaṁ bāca mūkaneṁbī prabhugaḷ . calada bhujabalada kalita nada laghuguṇakkādiyenisidī prabhumallaṁ kuladīpakanādaṁ nirmmaḷacaritaṁ piriya mahimeyiṁ piri
yaṇnaṁ . v® . jinapādāṁbujacaṁcarīkaneṟakaṁ vīrārinirddāraṇaṁ vinayāṁbhōnidhi bā caṇaṁ nijakuḷaprakhyātakaṁ mūkaneṁbanujarmmallana dakṣadakṣiṇabhujādaṇḍaṁgaḷirppaṁte mēdiniyoḷ rājisutirddarapratimaratyau
dāryyadiṁ śauryyadiṁ . Odavida kōpadiṁdamidirānta naraṁge kṛtāṁtarūpaneṁbudu kuḷiśāgniyeṁbudu davānaḷaneṁbudu siṁhikēyaneṁbudu daśakaṇṭhaneṁbudu bhayaṁkara māriya mūriyeṁbudallade pe
ṟadeṁbude negarda bācaṇanaṁ raṇaraṁgadhīranaṁ . koṁḍāḍida paravadhugaḷa taṁḍada moleyuṁḍa molle basirppetta basirmmaṁḍaḷavaṟiyalu tanagidakhaṁḍitasaccarita venipanī prabhumalla . Ā vibhuvina sati
negarddā rēvakige suḷōcanā mahādēvige saṁdī vadhu jinapatipadayugasēvege samanenisi malliyakkaṁ negardaḷ . tatputra . jōmaṁ varavanitājanakāmaṁ nijakuḷalalāma nudhdhatabhaya
kṛdbhīmaṁ vinūtavibudhaprēmaṁ nijagōtrabhūṣaṇaṁ dharegesedaṁ jananī jagajjanōdghahitamāgire kalpamahījadoṁdu paṇnane savidā phaḷaṁ saphaḷamāgire pettaḷo ninnanalladaṁdanimiṣa
dhēnu dugdhaparisēveyoḷī vapuvardhdhanapracōdanegeḍeyāyto pēḷenipudārppu mahā prabhu mallināthana . siḍiloṁdēḷeṁṭu kāḷāṁtakana masakavēḷeṁṭu rāhuprakōpaṁ paḍiyēḷeṁṭappaḍakkuṁ nina
ge samaradoḷ malla tāṁgalu taṟuṁbalu kaḍukeyyalu kaiydukeyyalu mareya luliyalurvvaḷaloṭṭaysaleytaṁ yiṁ muṁdaṇge mattoṁdaḍiyaniḍuva mallayva kellayvanāvoṁ . © .
vidoreyaṁgaḍittu jasavaṁ paḍevargge cāgavuddhataṁgēdoreyaṁgavaḷukada parā kramamaḷuki śaraṇyameṁdu baṁdēdoreyaṁge vajrakavacaṁ bagedāgaḷe bēḍukoṭṭapaṁ kādidapaṁ śaraṇgevare kādapanī prabhu malla
nurvviyoḷ . kaliyē sūdrakanīvanē surakudaṁ gaṁbhīranē vārdhdhi nirmmaḷacāritranē jā(ṁ)hnavīpriyasutaṁ satyavratakhyātanē gelevandaṁ negardarkkaputranumanendā nandadiṁ viśvabhūtaḷamellaṁ pogaḷguṁ
vacaḥkabarikāprōtthullanaṁ mallanaṁ . siṁgada kēsaraṁ huliya meydovalugraviṣōra gēṁdranuttuṁgaphaṇāḷiratnamenisirppuvu mattinavandirartthavē saṁgatavemma mallasa dhanaṁ jinayōgige jainagēha du
ttuṁgategāś®taṁge samasaṁdudu siddharasaṁ sudhārasaṁ . daḍigana nēṟilageyoḷoḷu poḍarisaluttuṁgamaṁ śilāmayamaṁ nērppaḍe mallijināśrayamaṁ paḍiyillene mallinātha vibhu māḍisidaṁ .
Ā prasiddhacaityāḷayācāryyar . śrīmūlasaṁghada sūrasthāmaḷagaṇa citrakūṭa gacchada yōgistōmamidu pūjyapādasvāmigaḷanvayavivarddhanardhdharegesedar . v® . smaramattēbha
kiśōrakēsari manōjōrvvīddhravajraṁ ratīśvaranīḷōtpaḷaṣaṇḍacaṇḍakaranā śāyōṣiduttaṁsabandhuramuktāphaḷaraśmi nirmmaḷayaśaḥśrīrōciyāgalu digaṁbara pūjyaṁ hariṇandidēvane
sedaṁ cāritracakrēśvaraṁ . sarasati kuṁcamaṁ dhariyisirddaḷo śāntarasaṁ tapasvinīcarita manāntudo sakaḷabhavyajanaṁgaḷa puṇyavṛddhi peṇbarijinoḷāryyikākṛtiyanāntudo pēḷimideṁdoṟaldu bi
ttaripudu dhātri caṁdramatiyavvegadaṁ vasudhā © svasti śrīmaccāḷukya pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamallavarṣada 10 neya prabhavasaṁvatsarada puṣya śuddha 13 bṛhaḻpativāramumu
ttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇa vyatīpātaṁ ḷ . śrī mannāḷprabhu mallagāvuṇḍaṁ tanna māḍisida mallināthajinēśvaraṁgaṁgabhōgakkaṁ raṁgabhōgakkaṁ nityanivēdyakkaṁ māṭakūṭaprāsā
dakka(ṁ)mallirppa riṣiyarggāhāradānakkaṁ sthaḷadalu biṭa bhā mūḍaṇa mēre goṇḍada baccalu . tenkaṇa mēre bāduṁbe . paḍuvaṇa mēre pārtthavaḷḷige hōda bhaṁḍivaṭṭe .
ḍuvaṇa baḍagaṇa mēre . gardugina koḷa . baḍagaṇa mēre pervvaḷḷige pōda perddāri . Antu samasta sīmāsamanvita mattaru hattu . © mākaṇaseṭṭiya keṟeya keḷage modalēriya gardde kamma .
ṟumaṁ dānyagoḷagamaṁ . gāṇadalu soṁṭigeyeṇneyuma (.) niṁtinitumanācaṁdrā rkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍevantāgi biṭṭar . © Intinitumaṁ tāvu nōḍi prati pāḷisuvar . © ka ©
tokkalamakkaḷ peṟapiṁgade mallināthajinapatigittaneṟedhānyagoḷagamaṁ pēraṟike yoḷācaṁdratāravuḷḷannevaraṁ . mattaṁ basadiya tējasāmyameṁteṁdaḍe hasu
hiṭṭa hūsuvaḍaṁ basadiyoḷe māḷpudu . maduvemāṇiyalu . dīpāvaḷi bāduṁbe kārapuṇnameyeṁbī mahāparvvagaḷoḷ basadige munna baṁdu śēṣeyaṁ koḷvudidu basadi
dī dharmmamaneṁduṁ viditaṁ pratipāḷipaṁge gaṁge kurukṣētradoḷubhayamukhi sahasra manodavire śubhadinadoḷitta phalamaṁ paḍevar . gaṁgāsāgara yamunā saṁgamado
sale puṇyadinaṁgaḷoḷaḷidavarggaḷapparintidanaḷidar . ślōka svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 18.151 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
